title: Bill Summary
prompt_preview:

Output JSON only matching the provided schema.
Return concise, standalone claim_texts that could be tested against scientific literature. Exclude purely procedural statem

raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "As credit and debit card usage has increased, interchange fees have nearly doubled in the last decade.",
    "Retailers generally pay between 2% to 4% in swipe fees on a credit card transaction.",
    "In 2021, retailers’ credit and debit card processing fees totaled $137.8 billion, up 25% from the previous year.",
    "Visa and MasterCard account for over 80% of all payment processing.",
    "Both Visa and MasterCard have a net profit margin near 50%, compared to the 3-9% average for US retailers.",
    "California merchants paid $1.7 billion in swipe fees on sales tax alone in 2023.",
    "The average cost of goods and services is now 20% higher than pre-pandemic prices.",
    "Arbitrarily high swipe fees contribute directly to the cost of living and inflation.",
    "The average American family pays about $1,100 per year in swipe fees."
  ]
}
```
